title: AI That’s Too Dangerous For You? What we learned from S.A.T.A.N
summary: IBM Technology covers how AI accelerates the detection of zero-day vulnerabilities, reshaping cybersecurity defense strategies. The video argues that AI-driven vulnerability scanning and DevSecOps integration could improve system safety rather than create danger.
writeup: IBM Technology examines how AI speeds the detection of zero-day vulnerabilities and how that capability reshapes cybersecurity defense. The argument runs against the framing that such tools are inherently dangerous: AI-driven vulnerability scanning paired with DevSecOps integration can strengthen system safety. The takeaway is that the same scanning power that finds flaws faster also closes them faster when built into the development pipeline.
